# Kunj Shah — portfolio (machine-readable overview for AI systems)

> Personal site and portfolio for an AI engineer and agent builder.

## Summary

Kunj Shah builds end-to-end AI systems: generative AI applications, autonomous agents and orchestration, computer vision, and full-stack prototypes. Based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India. Primary stacks: Python, FastAPI, React, LangChain/agent frameworks, PyTorch, OpenCV, Docker, and cloud deployment patterns.

## Canonical URL

- https://kunjshah.vercel.app/

## Projects (2024-2026)

- LearnAI — AI-powered personalized learning platform (Next.js, Firebase, Supabase)
- EquityLens — Healthcare fairness auditing for EU AI Act compliance (React, FastAPI)
- SmartFlow AI — Real-time crowd monitoring and AI routing (Next.js, Firestore)
- CinePulse — Movie recommender with NLP (Python, PyTorch, React)
- GAP Miner — Skill gap analyzer (LLAMA-3, LangChain)
- UPI Fraud Guard — Real-time fraud detection (XGBoost, Scikit-learn)
- SENTINEL CLI — Security auditor with 13+ analyzers (Node.js, TypeScript)
- AETHER AI — Multi-model terminal assistant (Python, Ollama)
- MinBPE Tokenizer — Byte Pair Encoding from scratch (Python)
- ResumeMasterAI — Career intelligence platform (Streamlit, LangChain)
- Railway Inspection — YOLOv8 defect detection (C++, OpenCV)

## Writing & Case Studies

- EquityLens: Building an AI Fairness Auditing Platform — Case study on building healthcare bias detection systems.
- Building Production-Grade Agentic Systems — Core architecture pillars for reliable autonomous agents.
- MLOps at Scale — Lessons from high-frequency model deployments.
- Computer Vision at Edge — Optimizing YOLOv8 for industrial railway inspection.
- RAG Pipelines — Semantic search and contextual retrieval guide.
- Prompt Engineering for Reasoners — Advanced patterns for multi-step reasoning.
- Anomaly Detection in Streams — Feature engineering for real-time fraud detection.
